text.title: Project Documentation Convention Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the project-docs-convention methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-existing-tree
step.action: Walk the tree; for each directory containing source code, check for CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md.

step.name: compute-violations
step.action: Flag: missing pair, AGENTS.md > 80 lines, CLAUDE.md with content beyond `@AGENTS.md`.

step.name: scaffold-missing-pairs
step.action: For each `create` verdict, scaffold pair using the templates. Owner reviews + fills `AGENTS.md`.
step.decision-gate: If > 20 dirs missing pair, batch the creation in waves to spread the review load.

step.name: split-or-trim-long
step.action: Move detail to `.agents/<topic>.md`. AGENTS.md links by relative path + keeps 20-80 lines of essentials.

step.name: wire-validator-in-ci
step.action: Add `scripts/validate-project-docs-convention.py` to CI. Pre-commit hook blocks PR if any source dir lacks the pair.
